Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensibleIntegerValidator<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being validated
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
IntegerValidator<T>, PrimitiveIntegerValidator<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractIntegerValidator, IntegerValidatorImpl, LongValidatorImpl, PrimitiveIntegerValidatorImpl
public interface ExtensibleIntegerValidator<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,T>
Validates the requirements of an integer value but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a IntegerValidator.
